summary.description: One sentence summary of the finding

category.description: Type of risk: behavior (logic/contract change), data (serialization/format), security (permissions/validation), performance (resource/latency), operability (config/env/platform)

intent_match.description: Whether the changes appear to match the stated task intent

reasoning.description: Full explanation of the blast radius analysis

scope_creep.description: List of changes that go beyond the stated intent. Empty if none.

missing_from_intent.description: Parts of the stated intent that were not addressed. Empty if fully implemented.

file.description: File path where the test should be added (e.g. internal/auth/auth_test.go)

scenario.description: One-line description of what the test should verify

suggested_tests.description: Highest-value regression tests to validate or disprove the findings. Empty if verdict is SAFE.
